هذا التعديل على الـ HTML: Stream Overlay
وفي server.js عدّل الـ member event تبعث البيانات الكاملة: tiktok.on("member", data => { const now = Date.now(); if (now - lastJoinTime >= EVENT_THROTTLE_MS) { if (data?.nickname || data?.uniqueId) { sendToOverlay("join", { name: data.nickname || data.uniqueId, avatar: data.profilePictureUrl, followers: data.userDetails?.followInfo?.followerCount, likes: data.userDetails?.followInfo?.likeCount, badges: data.userBadges || [] }); lastJoinTime = now; } } });
